text: ACM (January 2026) published a comprehensive survey on large language models for code generation, documenting that GPT-4 achieved 88.4% on HumanEval while open-source models like DeepSeek Coder V2 reached 90.2% on the same benchmark in 2025.

SWE-bench (Princeton, 2024) has become the de facto standard for evaluating AI coding agents on real-world software engineering tasks. As of early 2026, the best agents achieve 40-50% resolution rate on SWE-bench Verified, compared to 1-2% for naive LLM approaches.
